description: Style Note mark taylor has a fun yet masculine take on classic formal staples. This simple shirt hits all the corporate formal rules right and demands to be layered with a stylish trench coat and a slim tie. Style this with denims for a semi-formal vibe or pair it with chinos for a ready-to-work look. The stripes add a styling which cannot be ignored. Impress with a sharp look at work with this shirt. Product Details Pink, black and white striped shirt, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, back yoke, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemline Material and Care Blended Machine wash warm Drip dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 40
